title: Laboratory Sundries
description: Essential laboratory consumables, accessories, and support equipment including cleaning supplies, clamps, thermometers, and handling tools.

subcategories.name: Brushes & Cleaning Supplies
subcategories.description: Laboratory bottle brushes, test tube brushes, and specialist detergents for thorough cleaning of glassware and instruments.

subcategories.name: Clamps, Stands & Supports
subcategories.description: Retort stands, boss heads, burette clamps, and support frameworks in cast iron and stainless steel for apparatus assembly.

subcategories.name: Spatulas, Tongs & Forceps
subcategories.description: Stainless steel spatulas, crucible tongs, and precision forceps for handling samples, crucibles, and hot objects safely.

subcategories.name: Thermometers & Hydrometers
subcategories.description: Mercury-free glass thermometers, digital temperature probes, and specific gravity hydrometers for accurate measurements.

subcategories.name: Rubber & Cork Accessories
subcategories.description: Rubber bungs, cork stoppers, O-rings, and flexible tubing for sealing, connecting, and assembling laboratory apparatus.
